name: Edge Background Check Connector
description: Edge Custom Background Check API Template. Use this template to help generate your API contracts so that you can connect with CSOD and become a custom background check provider. Detailed in this API are endpoints that should be implemented so that the contract can adhere to Edge Custom Background Check Provier standards
